variables.name: CM_MODE_01_R
variables.description: Since your cancer diagnosis, have you used cannabis in the following ways? - Smoking such as in a joint, bong, pipe, or blunt

variables.name: CM_MODE_02_R
variables.description: Since your cancer diagnosis, have you used cannabis in the following ways? - Eating it in food such as brownies, cakes, cookies, or candy

variables.name: CM_MODE_03_R
variables.description: Since your cancer diagnosis, have you used cannabis in the following ways? - Drinking it in a liquid such as tea, cola, or alcohol

variables.name: CM_MODE_04_R
variables.description: Since your cancer diagnosis, have you used cannabis in the following ways? - Taking by mouth such as pills, tinctures, or sublingually

variables.name: CM_MODE_05_R
variables.description: Since your cancer diagnosis, have you used cannabis in the following ways? - Vaping or vaporizing such as in an e-cigarette-like vaporizer or other vaping device

variables.name: CM_MODE_06_R
variables.description: Since your cancer diagnosis, have you used cannabis in the following ways? - Dabbing such as using waxes or shatter

variables.name: CM_MODE_07_R
variables.description: Since your cancer diagnosis, have you used cannabis in the following ways? - Applying topically such as in a lotion, cream, or patch

variables.name: CM_MODE_08_R
variables.description: Since your cancer diagnosis, have you used cannabis in the following ways? - Other

variables.name: CM_MODE_OS_R
variables.description: Since your cancer diagnosis, have you used cannabis in the following ways? - Other (specify)
